scope: Route-level password reset request -> local provider rawToken extraction -> confirm -> old password rejection -> login with new password, without external mailbox.

spec.goal: Prove the next minimal reset happy-path slice that is possible without a real mailbox.
nonGoals: Do not mark RISK-AUTH-EMAIL-RESET-HAPPY-PATH as pass.
Do not claim live SMTP/mailcatcher delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1: An existing-user reset request stores a reset token and exposes the sent rawToken through the injected local EmailProvider seam.
AC2: The extracted rawToken confirms successfully through POST /api/auth/password-reset/confirm.
AC3: The old password is rejected after confirm.
AC4: The new password logs in and receives a session cookie.

evidence.testUpdated: apps/api/src/authRegistrationRoutes.test.ts:283 full password reset happy path now asserts old password login returns 401 invalid_credentials before new-password login succeeds.
evidence.localExtractionPath: createInMemoryEmailProvider().lastPasswordReset.rawToken captures the raw token passed to EmailProvider.sendPasswordReset by the real route handler.

commands.notes: First sandboxed attempt failed with spawn EPERM while starting Vite/esbuild; rerun outside sandbox passed. Existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts is unrelated.

commands.result: blocked by unrelated existing error: apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts(1043,22): Cannot find name 'createVideoProvider'.
blocked before typecheck by existing ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS.

remainingBlocker: Live mailbox delivery/extraction remains unverified: current browser/runtime path returns delivery=none, docker compose has no local mailcatcher/MailHog/Mailpit service, and the running server exposes no guarded e2e token extraction hook. Need configured SMTP/local mailcatcher API or an explicit test-only extraction hook before full browser request -> mailbox token -> confirm UI -> new-password login can be marked pass.
